events.label: reasoning
events.text:
We need answer JSON only. Need parse scenario. Task: identify component or condition shown, name visible defect cues. Scenario: heavy industrial construction, Gauging & GD&T basics, observed field condition: datum scheme misunderstood (part checked off wrong surface - DOC). Work rough-complete. Reference ASME Y14.5, gauge instructions.

We need produce JSON with fields. decision: fail because non-compliant / installed-defective? The condition is datum scheme misunderstood, part checked off wrong surface - DOC (document?). This is a quality/GD&T error: inspection used wrong datum, so part may be accepted incorrectly or rejected incorrectly. Since work is rough-complete and defective/non-compliant, decision fail. risk: high? Could lead to misalignment, assembly issues, rework. component_conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. percent_complete maybe 80? value 0. sound_source irrelevant. confidence 0.95. event_time 0. rate 0. order empty. workable empty. findings: e.g., "Part inspected using incorrect datum surface", "Datum scheme not per ASME Y14.5 drawing", "DOC checkoff recorded against wrong surface", "Potential for out-of-tolerance feature accepted". actions: "Reject inspection record and re-inspect using correct datum features", "Verify datum targets/symbols on drawing", "Recalibrate/setup gauge per datum scheme", "Retrain inspector on GD&T datum reference frame", "Update DOC with correct datum references". rationale: brief. references: ASME Y14.5 (basic), gauge instructions, maybe project drawings/specs.

Need ensure JSON valid. No prose outside.

events.label: response
events.text:
{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "high",
  "work_stage": "rough-complete",
  "component_conditions": ["installed-defective", "non-compliant"],
  "percent_complete": 80,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 0.95,
  "event_time": 0.0,
  "rate": 0.0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Part was inspected against the wrong datum surface",
    "Datum reference frame misunderstood or not applied per the drawing",
    "DOC checkoff recorded using an incorrect datum feature",
    "Gauge setup/usage does not match the engineered datum scheme",
    "Risk of accepting out-of-tolerance geometry or rejecting conforming parts"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Reject the current inspection record and quarantine the part/lot",
    "Re-inspect using the correct datum features defined on the drawing",
    "Verify datum targets, datum symbols, and feature control frames per ASME Y14.5",
    "Reconfigure the gauge/fixture to reference the proper datum surfaces",
    "Retrain the inspector on datum reference frame establishment and gauge alignment",
    "Correct the DOC and update inspection records with the right datum references"
  ],
  "rationale": "The observed condition is a GD&T datum scheme error: the part was checked off the wrong surface, so the inspection result is invalid and the work is non-compliant. Until re-inspected against the correct datum reference frame, the component must be treated as installed-defective.",
  "references": [
    "ASME Y14.5 (basic) - datum reference frames and feature control",
    "Gauge instructions - datum setup and alignment",
    "Project drawings and inspection documents (DOC)"
  ]
}
